title: Gateway LR recombination of entry clones in pDONR/zeo into destination plasmid (5 µl assay)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5nvvk","text":"This is a slightly modified version of Thermo Fisher's gateway LR protocol which uses less enzyme and is therefore more economical.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: %s %s 75 ng entry clone x µl 75 ng destination plasmid x µl TE buffer pH 8.0 to a total volume of 4 µl
Remove from freezer and vortext for 2 seconds
add 0.5 µl of LR Clonase II enzyme mix and mix well
Incubate for 3 hours at room temperature (4-6 hours or overnight for more colonies) 03:00:00
add 0.5 µl Proteinase K, mix well and incubate for 10 min at 37°C 00:10:00
Combine 1 µl LR product with 50 µl Omnimax 2 competent E.coli cells in 1.5 ml tube.
37° C at 250 rpm on shaking incubator. 01:00:00
Spin tubes at 1000 x g for 2 minutes. Decant most of ther supernatant. Resuspend cells in 50 - 100 µl of leftover supernatant.
Plate concentrated cells on LB containing 30 µg/ml kanamycin.
creator: Johannes Wolfram JWD Debler
